title: Concurrency, Cancellation, Timeouts, Retries, and Flake Control · Workflow Trust Lens: Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair
summary: Two deployments race for one environment, an older run completes last, cancelled jobs skip cleanup, a hung process consumes the runner limit, and retries erase the first failure. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci flake detection quarantine repair increment in bounded execution and concurrency policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect nondeterminism through repeated changed schedules, classify cause, quarantine with owner and expiry, and require repaired regression evidence.
Retry only classified transient operations with idempotency, attempt limits, backoff, first-failure preservation, and duplicate-side-effect defense.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example older deployment finishes after a newer revision, cancellation skips cleanup, a child process exceeds 2 minutes, and retries erase the first failure. Bound concurrency, staleness, timeouts, idempotency, and flake repair. Competency probe: Detect nondeterminism through repeated changed schedules, classify cause, quarantine with owner and expiry, and require repaired regression evidence. content.code:
# Evidence: ci-worked-gha-concurrency-timeouts-flake-control-3
  - competency: ci-worked-gha-concurrency-timeouts-flake-control-3
    artifact: execution-control.yaml
    decision: worked gha concurrency timeouts flake control 3
    environment: Node 24 TypeScript monorepo with three lockfiles
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked3
    change: |
      concurrency-group: deploy-production-service-a
      cancel-in-progress: tests-only
      revision-guard: compare-before-mutate
      job-timeout-minutes: 20
      command-timeout-seconds: 90
      cleanup: always-idempotent
      retry: classified-transient-max-2
      first-failure: retained
      flake-owner-expiry: team-delivery-7-days
    verify: simulate overlapping revisions cancellation timeout transient failure duplicate side effect and cleanup interruption
    failure: Reject blanket cancellation, commit-order assumptions, timeout as cleanup, all-error retry, or ownerless quarantine.
    repair: Scope concurrency to shared state, reject stale mutation, bound every wait, preserve first failure, and expire quarantine.
content.caption: Runnable CI/CD workflow, artifact, release, and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
